summary: Comprehensive testing of Staylet app completed. All 51 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: signup/login flows, dashboard stats, property CRUD, compliance record CRUD with status calculation, task management, billing page with Stripe checkout, mobile layout. Stripe checkout redirects correctly to checkout.stripe.com.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint (33 API tests passed)
Backend: Authentication - signup, login, get me, password reset
Backend: Property CRUD - create, read, update, delete, search
Backend: Property validation - empty name/address/postcode rejected
Backend: Compliance record CRUD - create, read, update, delete
Backend: Compliance status calculation - compliant, expiring_soon, overdue
Backend: Dashboard stats - structure and accuracy
Backend: Tasks CRUD - create, list
Backend: Subscription plans - Solo £19, Portfolio £39, Operator £79
Backend: Subscription check-limit endpoint
Backend: Subscription change endpoint with upgrade/downgrade logic
Backend: Stripe checkout endpoint - creates session and returns checkout URL
Backend: Payment status endpoint - returns 404 for invalid session
Frontend: Signup flow - creates user and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Login flow - authenticates and redirects to app
Frontend: Dashboard - shows stats (Properties, Expiring Soon, Overdue, Missing, Tasks Due)
Frontend: Dashboard - shows overdue alert section
Frontend: Dashboard - shows upcoming expiries and tasks due this month
Frontend: Properties page - lists properties with compliance summary
Frontend: Property modal - form validation (empty fields show errors)
Frontend: Upgrade modal - shows when at property limit
Frontend: Compliance record modal - form validation working
Frontend: Compliance record creation - status calculated correctly (expiring_soon)
Frontend: Tasks page - shows task list with filters
Frontend: Task modal - all fields present (title, description, due date, priority, category, property, recurring)
Frontend: Billing page - shows current subscription info
Frontend: Billing page - shows all 3 plan cards with correct pricing
Frontend: Billing page - monthly/annual toggle works
Frontend: Billing page - Subscribe button initiates Stripe checkout redirect
Frontend: Billing success page - shows error immediately for invalid session (404)
Frontend: Mobile layout (390px) - hamburger menu, sidebar overlay, responsive cards
seed_data_creation: Test compliance record 'Test Compliance Record' created with expiring_soon status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Stripe checkout is in TEST MODE (sk_test_emergent) - redirects to checkout.stripe.com but payments cannot be completed. BillingSuccessPage correctly shows error for invalid sessions. Dashboard stats accurately reflect compliance records and tasks. Mobile layout is responsive with hamburger menu.

authentication.signup: Working - creates user with Solo plan, trial status, 14-day trial
authentication.password_reset: MOCKED - returns success without sending email

dashboard.stats: Properties: 2, Expiring Soon: 2, Overdue: 1, Missing: 0, Tasks Due: 1
dashboard.overdue_alert: Shows overdue items with immediate attention banner
dashboard.upcoming_expiries: Shows next 5 expiries with days until expiry

properties.crud: Create, read, update, delete all working
properties.validation: Empty name/address/postcode rejected with error messages
properties.compliance_summary: Shows total, compliant, expiring_soon, overdue, missing counts

compliance_records.crud: Create, read, update, delete all working
compliance_records.status_calculation: Correctly calculates compliant, expiring_soon (<=30 days), overdue
compliance_records.validation: Empty title/category rejected with error messages

tasks.fields: Title, description, due date, priority, category, property, recurring

billing.subscription_info: Shows plan, status, properties count, price
billing.success_page: Shows error immediately for invalid session

mobile_layout.billing: Stacked subscription info and plan cards

stripe_integration.payment_status: Returns 404 for invalid session, polls for valid session
stripe_integration.note: Payments cannot be completed in test mode
